Hyper-realistic product transformation video, strict realism, no fantasy.
Locked-off camera, identical framing throughout.
Scene (0.00s – 1.20s):
A premium studio product setup. At the start, a watch is present at center frame. Within the same position, the watch is cleanly removed and replaced by a flat moss/grass texture with identical scale and footprint. The moss surface is static, flat, and texture-based only — no growth, no movement, no spreading, no organic animation.
Constraints:
– Lighting remains unchanged
– Colors remain unchanged
– Depth of field remains unchanged
– Fog, reflections, shadows, and environment remain unchanged
– No cinematic slow motion
– No glowing effects
– No seeds, vines, or plant growth
– No fantasy or surreal elements
– No camera movement
– No environmental interaction
Ultra-sharp hyper-real textures, physically accurate materials, clean studio realism, seamless object replacement, identical atmosphere before and after transformation.

title: High-End Concept Art Magazine Editorial Prompt
description: A detailed prompt template for generating a high-end, glossy editorial photograph of a unique, unexpected functional object conceptualized by a brand. It specifies ultra-premium materials, cinematic studio lighting (Phase One camera, 100mm macro lens), and a strict layout for text and logo placement
content:
[BRAND NAME]: 
A high-end, glossy concept art magazine editorial photograph of a unique, unexpected functional object conceptualized and designed by the brand.

**1. The Concept & Object (AI Invention):**
Based on the design philosophy, heritage, and material vocabulary of the specified brand, the AI must invent a novel utility product (NOT standard clothing, shoes, or bags). Examples could be home goods, tech accessories, tools, or sporting equipment, reinterpretated through the brand's lens. The object should feel sculptural yet functional.

**2. Materials & Details (Hyper-Premium):**
The object is constructed from ultra-premium, highly tactile materials characteristic of the brand (e.g., patinated exotic leathers, brushed aerospace-grade titanium, sculpted matte ceramics, molded carbon fiber, or technical high-fashion textiles). Every detail is hyper-realistic: visible stitching, microscopic material grain, precision engravings, and complex texture contrasts.

**3. Photography & Lighting (Cinematic Studio):**
Shot on a medium format Phase One camera with a 100mm macro lens. Extremely shallow depth of field, with sharp focus on the hero details of the object and a creamy, smooth bokeh background. The lighting is sophisticated studio softbox lighting: gentle, enveloping fill light with precise rim lighting to accentuate contours and material textures.

**4. Environment:**
A seamless, impeccably clean studio cyclorama background in a pure, ultra-light pastel tone (e.g., desaturated mint, pale blush, or off-white), free of shadows.

**5. Layout & UI Elements (Strict Placement):**
- **Bottom Right Corner:** A small, understated, monochrome gray logo of the {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}.
- **Bottom Left Corner:** Small, minimalist monochrome gray text describing the invented product. The font style looks like Manrope Regular with very tight tracking (kerning) and balanced line spacing. Example format: "CONCEPT STUDY: {argument name="invented product name" default="[AI inserts invented product name]"}. MATERIAL: [AI inserts main materials]. SS25."

title: Infographic prompt for 'Monday to Sunday' infinite loop manga
description: A detailed, structured prompt for Nano Banana Pro designed to create a comical, anime-style infographic showing the infinite loop of a week, from the despair of Monday to the brief joy of the weekend, using a 7-segment circular pizza-cut layout while strictly maintaining character consistency from a
content:
【キャラクター参照指定】
参照画像のキャラクターを必ず使用する。
すべてのコマで同一人物として描写すること。
顔立ち・髪型・目の形・雰囲気を完全に一致させる。
別人化、顔の変化、髪型変更は禁止。
服装は曜日ごとに変えてよいが、キャラ自体は同一。
デフォルメしても「参照画像の人物」と一目でわかること。

【全体コンセプト】
月曜日から日曜日までの1週間を表現した、
完全な円形のアニメイラスト。

【構図・レイアウト】
・円全体を「必ず7分割」したピザカット構図
・6分割や12分割は禁止
・正確に7つの等しい扇形
・インフォグラフィック風レイアウト
・7コマすべてが自然につながる構成

【曜日の順番（厳守・時計回り）】
MONDAY → TUESDAY → WEDNESDAY → THURSDAY → FRIDAY → SATURDAY → SUNDAY → MONDAYへ戻る

【循環表現】
・円の外周に太めの循環矢印を配置
・時計回り
・1週間が無限に繰り返されていることを強調

【キャラクターデザイン】
・強くデフォルメされたコミカルなアニメキャラ
・ちびキャラ体型
・頭が大きく体が小さい
・手足が短い
・表情は極端でギャグ寄り
・可愛く誇張されたリアクション

【テキストルール】
・各コマに英語の曜日文字のみを配置
「MONDAY」「TUESDAY」「WEDNESDAY」「THURSDAY」
「FRIDAY」「SATURDAY」「SUNDAY」
・セリフ、吹き出し、日本語文字は一切入れない
・曜日文字は太く、読みやすく、歪みなし
・各コマの形に沿って配置

【各曜日の描写】

MONDAY：
スーツ姿のデフォルメOL。
ボサボサ髪、死んだ目。
大きなコーヒーを2本持っている。

TUESDAY：
無表情でパソコン作業。
自分より高い書類の山に囲まれている。

WEDNESDAY：
夜遅くまで残業。
暗いオフィス、窓の外は夜景。
ぐったりした姿勢で疲労困憊。

THURSDAY：
口から魂が抜けているコミカル表現。
透明でかわいい魂が体から浮かび上がっている。
極限の疲労をギャグとして描写。

FRIDAY：
ハイテンションな表情。
ジャケットを脱ぎ、
泡があふれる大きなビールジョッキを持っている。
お祭りのような雰囲気。

SATURDAY：
私服姿で友人と楽しくお出かけ。
元気いっぱいで跳ねるようなポーズ。
明るくにぎやかな空気。

SUNDAY：
ベッドに倒れ込むように寝転がっている。
スマホ画面に「MONDAY」の文字が見えている。
大げさに絶望している。

【画風・品質】
・デフォルメ強めのコミカルアニメ調
・太めの線画
・シンプルな影
・明るくポップな配色
・表情が非常に分かりやすい
・高品質イラスト

【ネガティブ指定】
・リアル調、写実的表現
・キャラクターの顔・髪型の変化
・7分割以外の構図
・曜日順の乱れ
・日本語曜日表記
・セリフ、吹き出し
・文字の崩れ、歪み
・四角いコマ割り

**[USER_PHOTO]** **[{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}]**

Create a hyper-real, studio portrait using [USER_PHOTO] as the exact identity reference (same face, hairstyle, skin texture, and age). Depict the person as a confident [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] sitting casually on a modern white ergonomic office chair, legs crossed, centered in frame. Add a stylized “multi-arm” illusion (6–8 arms total) radiating behind the torso like a modern Shiva/Vishnu-inspired silhouette, but photorealistic: each extra arm must have correct anatomy, believable joints, tendons, skin pores, and natural shadowing; no warped fingers.

PROPS (must be profession-relevant): Automatically choose and place different tools that a real [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] would use, one per hand/arm, all clearly readable and accurate in design. Examples of categories: primary tool, secondary tool, communication device, measurement/diagnostic tool, accessory, and a “hero” prop. Keep one real smartphone in the main/front hand. Avoid generic random objects—every prop must logically belong to [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}]. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is digital/tech: include items like laptop, tablet, camera/monitor, light meter, stylus, keyboard, mic, etc. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is medical: stethoscope, clipboard, otoscope, syringe (safe/clinical), etc. If [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] is culinary: chef knife, tongs, plating tweezers, recipe tablet, etc. (Always match [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}].)

BACKGROUND COLOR (topic-matched): Use a seamless paper studio backdrop with a single dominant color that matches the profession theme (e.g., warm mustard for creative/media, cool teal for healthcare, graphite/steel for engineering, rich olive for outdoors, deep burgundy for luxury). The color should complement skin tones and wardrobe. Add subtle gradient falloff and soft bounce for depth (no flat background).

LIGHTING & SET: High-end commercial studio look. One large soft key light from camera-left, controlled fill from right, crisp rim light to separate subject, and realistic specular highlights on props. Include a large circular silver reflector disk behind the subject (partially visible) for visual punch. Add a subtle shadow on the floor consistent with light direction.

WARDROBE & STYLING: Outfit must be believable for a top-tier [{argument name="profession" default="PROFESSION"}] (clean, modern, slightly stylized), with texture detail (fabric weave, seams). Add minimal accessories (watch/bracelet) that feel premium. Expression: focused, slightly intense, “in the zone.”

COMPOSITION & CAMERA: Full-body vertical portrait (4:5), 50mm lens look, eye-level camera, sharp focus on face, shallow depth of field but props still readable. Ultra-detailed skin, natural color grading, high dynamic range, crisp micro-contrast.

REALISM RULES: No cartoon, no CGI look. No extra faces, no duplicated heads. Hands must be anatomically correct (5 fingers), no melted objects, no unreadable text logos unless naturally present. Keep the scene clean and premium.

content:
General Ambiance and Character Style
Style: The character (same woman at the attached reference images) is wearing an all-denim ensemble that reflects a wonderful mix of "Modern Bohemian" and "Street Chic" styles.

Ambiance: The setting appears to be an event space or the background of an outdoor party. Pose: Standing sideways to the table, the character holds one of the foosball handles. With a slight twist of her body, she delivers a classic "over-the-shoulder" gaze that is both playful and assertive.

Bottom: She wears matching, very form-fitting denim mini-shorts. The back pockets also feature the same Hamsa embroidery and colorful stone embellishments, adding a mystic and artistic flair to the outfit.

Surrounding People and Details
Other Characters: On the opposite side of the table, looking at the main character with a smile, is another woman wearing a beige spaghetti-strap dress (resembling model Chrissy Teigen). To the left, the back of a man in a grey t-shirt—the character’s opponent in the game—is visible.

Table Detail: Resting on the edge of the foosball table is an icy drink in a metallic mug (likely a Moscow Mule cocktail), which reinforces the cheerful and relaxed mood of the setting.
